title: Argentina soybeans to China
summary:
Main
Weekly Dry Market Monitor
Spot Rates | Supply-Demand Trends | Port Congestion Overview
Week 39, 25 Sept, 2025
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-09-29 105344.png | assets/2025-09-29_argentina-soybeans-to-china_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_bdffeb9b2e57.png
Soybean flows from Argentina to China in 2025 tell a striking turnaround story. Early in the year, shipments (blue line) lagged 2024 levels (grey line), but from April onward, they overtook them and stayed strong through Q3. The April harvest ignited momentum, and the mid-year slump that weighed on 2024 was largely avoided.
